label: Transport ship
description: Defines a transport ship archetype, linking its in-map ThingDef, world skyfaller visuals, and world object representation.

shipThing.label: Ship thing
shipThing.description: ThingDef placed on the local map when this transport ship is landed.

arrivingSkyfaller.label: Arriving skyfaller
arrivingSkyfaller.description: ThingDef spawned as the skyfaller visual when this ship arrives at a map.

leavingSkyfaller.label: Leaving skyfaller
leavingSkyfaller.description: ThingDef spawned as the skyfaller visual when this ship departs a map. Omitted for crash-landing variants that never leave.

worldObject.label: World object
worldObject.description: WorldObjectDef spawned on the world map when this ship is in transit. Omitted for crash-landing variants.

maxLaunchDistance.label: Max launch distance
maxLaunchDistance.description: Maximum world tiles this ship can travel in a single launch. 0 means unlimited.

playerShuttle.label: Player shuttle
playerShuttle.description: If true, this ship is treated as a player-controlled shuttle for landing pad and permit mechanics.

basic-transport-ship.label: Basic transport ship
basic-transport-ship.description: Minimal transport ship with a landed thing and arriving skyfaller.
